name: Compounding Workflow
description: Decision logic for when query answer should be saved as new wiki page.

triggers_and_scoring.when: synthesis from 2+ pages with novel inference

guardrails.enforcement: All compounding proposals → user_confirm → TRANSITION to process-ingest.json. Direct edit() prohibited.
All wiki create/update MUST go through process-ingest.json steps. Web sources pass step_2.7 gateway.

topic_expansion_rule.action_if_met: AUTO_INGEST_TOPIC_EXPANSION — TRANSITION_TO process-ingest.json via web_ingest_flow (create_new_expansion_of_existing, no user_confirm)
topic_expansion_rule._note: Once topic approved in wiki → subsequent pages for same topic become auto_ingest
